This image shows an ant, specifically identified as *Camponotus flavomarginatus* based on the filename. This is a species of carpenter ant. The image provides a detailed close-up view of the ant, showing its distinctive features including its segmented body with a head, thorax, and abdomen (gaster), as well as its antennae and legs. The photograph appears to be taken against a white background, giving a clear view of the ant's morphology and coloration.
